title: Search
summary: AI-aware site search across tools and feed posts. Falls back to instant fuzzy keyword matching; uses Qwen3.5-0.8B for natural-language summaries when the model is already cached locally.

title: Step Counter
summary: Session pedometer that counts steps from your phone's motion sensor — distance, pace, and a daily goal ring, all on-device.

title: QR & Barcode Scanner + Generator
summary: Scan QR codes and barcodes, or generate a QR code from any link or text — all on-device, nothing uploaded.

title: Decision Wheel
summary: Offline-ready spinner for quick calls: Yes, No, Up to you, or Wait & try again.

title: Countdown Timer
summary: Up to 4 simultaneous countdown timers with custom titles. Set a duration or pick a target date & time (max 99 hrs).

title: Coin Flip
summary: Animated heads or tails coin flip with optional best-of-N series mode. Works offline.

title: Quick Notes
summary: Minimal scratchpad that saves to your browser. Supports multiple notes with localStorage persistence.

title: Base64 Codec
summary: Encode and decode text or files (including images) to and from Base64. All processing stays in your browser.

title: Color Picker
summary: Pick colors, generate harmonious palettes, and copy values in HEX, RGB, and HSL. Works offline.

title: AI Chat
summary: Chat with Qwen3.5-0.8B running locally in your browser via WebGPU. Supports vision. No data leaves your device.

title: Motivational Quote
summary: AI-generated original motivational quotes. Runs locally in your browser.

title: Infinite Radio
summary: AI-generated epic cinematic music streaming infinitely. Learns your taste locally. No data leaves your device.

title: Invoice Generator
summary: Build clean, single-page invoices in your browser. Auto-saves, prints to A4, exports/imports JSON. No data leaves your device.

title: Markdown → PDF
summary: Write markdown, see a live preview, and download a clean professional PDF. Auto-saves to your browser. No data leaves your device.

title: Tetris
summary: Browser-native Tetris in the Mentria synthwave palette. Touch, keyboard, and mouse supported. Plays offline.

title: Breakout
summary: Brick-buster paddle game with synthwave powerups, lives, and a high-score table. Plays offline.

title: Flappy
summary: Paper plane flapping through stacks of command prompts. Tap, click, or SPACE. Plays offline.

title: Minesweeper
summary: Classic logic puzzle in terminal dress. Three difficulties, mouse + touch input, best-time tracking. Plays offline.
